name: Progressive Web App
description: Progressive Web Apps are web applications that use modern browser capabilities to deliver app-like experiences. PWAs can work offline, send push notifications, access device hardware, and be installed on the user's home screen without requiring an app store submission.
advantages: No app store required for distribution
Works offline with service worker caching
Small footprint compared to native applications
Cross-platform by nature (works on any browser)
disadvantages: Limited access to some device APIs compared to native apps
Inconsistent support across different browsers and platforms
Service worker lifecycle can be complex to debug
iOS has limited PWA support compared to Android
